title: Jooonah's Grove
description: A green-toned shader pack made for Jooonah, perfect for creators and gamers who love green. Features a green-themed sky and an overall green aesthetic.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yB4psLF5iQY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


[![YT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f48639fd7b91b3a2c29f76ac474ba419a01a109.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@GlacierServicesMC)


### About Shaders

**Joonah’s Groove is a fanmade shader pack created for Jooonah, a popular Minecraft 1.8 creator. It features a green-themed sky, glowing clouds, and an overall green tone inspired by Jooonah’s 1.8 texture pack.
The shaders include two styles of clouds – realistic and fantasy – which you can customize in the settings.
It’s compatible with all versions of Minecraft and works with both [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) and [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).**

### Credit
**The base shaders used is [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by EminGT, and this project fully follows its license.**

**OFFER!!**

![offer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c2601c81bad72a543406e08506cd532288fc150.png)

### Styles
**Jooonah's Grove comes with two types of clouds – Fantasy and Realistic, both customizable in the settings.**
